sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date TIMESTAMP, description TEXT, amount NUMERIC);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (3, '2020-03-20 22:10:00', 'Spring Equinox', 250.00), (4, NULL, 'Another event', 75.75);
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS event_month, amount FROM test_dates WHERE amount IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS month_value FROM test_dates WHERE month(event_date) < (SELECT month(current_timestamp));
SELECT id, (amount - 50) AS adjusted_amount FROM test_dates WHERE adjusted_amount > 100;
SELECT COUNT(id) AS total_events, month(event_date) AS event_month FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_month HAVING total_events > 1;
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS month_of_event, description FROM test_dates WHERE month(event_date) - month(current_timestamp) = 1;
SELECT id, (month(event_date) - month(NULL)) AS month_difference FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS month_value FROM test_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE amount < 200);
SELECT DISTINCT month(event_date) AS unique_months FROM test_dates ORDER BY unique_months ASC;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, event_date, amount FROM test_dates WHERE amount IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, month(event_date) AS event_month FROM temp_dates WHERE event_month = (SELECT month('2020-01-01 12:30:00') - 1);
SELECT id, month(event_date) + month('2020-02-01') AS total_months FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE month(event_date) = month(NOW()) AND (amount IS NOT NULL OR description IS NULL);
SELECT id, (amount + 0) AS adjusted_amount FROM test_dates WHERE adjusted_amount - 25 > 225;
